description: Zero test coverage for debounce timer logic. The 100ms IPC debounce (ipcDebounceTimer) and 2000ms idle save debounce (idleSaveTimer) are implemented in FeedRow.svelte:163-178 but have no corresponding tests. REQ-002 acceptance criteria require verifying 'IPC calls for the same noteId are serialized' and debounce correctness. REQ-007 acceptance criteria require verifying 'After 2 seconds of idle typing, trigger_idle_save is invoked' and 'If blur occurs within 2 seconds of typing, the idle timer is cancelled and only blur save fires'. None of these behaviors are covered by the existing test suite.

evidence.description: Covers only validate_no_control_chars (PROP-009). No debounce tests.

secondaryEvidence.description: Covers only mount/unmount idempotency (PROP-011, PROP-012). No debounce or timer tests.
Acceptance criteria: 'After 2 seconds of idle typing, trigger_idle_save is invoked', 'If blur occurs within 2 seconds, the idle timer is cancelled and only blur save fires'
